# shelly_zigbee_config (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) The IP address of the Shelly device.

### Optional

- `enable` (Boolean) True if Zigbee connectivity is enabled, false otherwise
